name: Carpaccio and Artichoke Salad
recipeIngredient: Filet mignon; cut into 1 oz steaks (4 oz total)
recipeInstructions:
For artichoke salad:
Artichoke hearts; julienne (1 cup)
Extra-virgin olive oil (3 tbsp)
Garlic; minced (1/2 tsp)
Salt
Pepper
Arugula (4 cups)
Garnish:
Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese (3 oz)
Parsley; chopped (2 tbsp)
Black pepper
Prepare the carpaccio by pounding the slices of filet between 2 sheets of plastic wrap with a meat mallet.
For the artichoke salad, combine all ingredients in a small bowl and toss well. Season with salt and pepper. In another mixing bowl, toss the arugula with extra-virgin olive oil. Lay the carpaccio on the plate. Drizzle the meat with olive oil and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper. Mound the arugula in the center of the meat. Sprinkle the artichoke salad around the arugula. Garnish with shaved Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, black pepper, and parsley.
